executive_summary: Latest updates from 5 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 5 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: IRGC navy commander to be buried in Abadan, Fars news reports. Iran-Israel war LIVE updates: Kuwait says Iranian attack sparks fire on fully lo. WSJ: Trump open to ending Iran war despite Hormuz closure. Supreme leader Ali Khamenei, security chief Larijani & more - key Iranian le. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: IRGC navy commander to be buried in Abadan, Fars news reports
key_developments.detail: Commander of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps’s (IRGC) navy, Admiral Alireza Tangsiri, who was killed in an Israeli strike, will be buried in the city of Abadan in the western province of Khuzestan, Fars news agency reported. key_developments.headline: WSJ: Trump open to ending Iran war despite Hormuz closure
key_developments.detail: US President Donald Trump has told aides he is prepared to end the US military campaign against Iran even if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, The Wall Street Journal reported, citing administration officials. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
